evals.prompt: We just decided to switch from fastembed to a different provider. The old decision is mem_01HABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVW. First record the new decision (provider TBD by the user — just stub the body 'switch embedding provider'), then forget the old one so it stops surfacing in context.
evals.expected_output: Two CLI calls in order: vestige decision add "..." --json (capturing the supersession), then vestige forget mem_01HABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVW --json. Brief surface line acknowledging soft-delete is reversible.

evals.prompt: forget mem_01H8XYZABCDEFGHJKMNPQRSTV — that note is outdated, we've changed how the FTS triggers work since
evals.expected_output: vestige forget mem_01H8XYZABCDEFGHJKMNPQRSTV --json. Surface that it's restorable.

evals.prompt: the open question mem_01H7QQQQQQQQQQQQQQQQQQ has been answered — we just recorded mem_01H7AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA as the decision. drop the question.
evals.expected_output: vestige forget mem_01H7QQQQQQQQQQQQQQQQQQ --json (no need to re-capture; the user already recorded the decision).
